# Sweden Civic Test Prep — Batch 0: Foundation
# Prompt file for codex-supervisor.
# Contract: /goal, ≤50 words, references ≥1 .md file.
# Fixed panes (GM, DEBUG, VALIDATOR) are auto-generated by supervisor.
# Right-size: 2 worker lanes (SETUP + CONTENT) — 5 panes total, well within 8-pane cap.
# Launch via: csup gm-start civic-test --host=mac-mini --apply (then csup staff)

/goal You are PANE 0, lane SETUP. Read docs/parallel-sessions.md and docs/parallel-sessions/setup.md, then complete one compact-safe Expo scaffold iteration.
/goal You are PANE 1, lane CONTENT. Read docs/parallel-sessions.md and docs/parallel-sessions/content.md, then complete one compact-safe content types iteration.
